title: spawn_fetch takes data_dir: String instead of PathBuf
description:
LOCATION: src/card.rs:311-338, src/feed.rs:141, src/webhook.rs:114

FINDING: card::spawn_fetch accepts data_dir: String and immediately converts it to Path::new(&data_dir) inside the spawned task. All three call sites (feed.rs:141, webhook.rs:114, server.rs implicit via spawn_fetch) must convert their PathBuf/Path to String first, potentially losing non-UTF-8 paths. feed.rs:141 uses the lossy fallback to_str().unwrap_or(".") which silently substitutes a wrong path on non-UTF-8 systems.

IMPACT: Non-UTF-8 data_dir paths silently use '.' as the media directory, storing files in the current working directory instead of the configured location. Callers pay an unnecessary String allocation.
close_reason: Deferred: spawn_fetch takes String because tokio::spawn requires 'static owned data.
